productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Boat Low Lime Shoe
description: adidas takes on the trend with Boat CC Lace Red White this summer. Take these portable ClimaCool water shoes designed for wet or dry fun to the shore, and stay cool wherever you are.UpperDurable quick-dry suede and mesh for excellent ventilation and fresh feel to the feetEVA tongue for enhnaced comfort and access CLIMACOOL technology employed for 360-degree cooling of the whole footMidsoleWater grip midsole for maximum traction in amphibious conditions, making sure each step has a fluid movementEVA injected midsole for long-term, lightweight cushioning adidas drainage system for maximum water drainage and dry protection for the feetOutsoleWater grip outsole for extra traction in wet and slippery environmentRubber and wired mesh inlays for excess moisture/water drainage while walking in wet conditionsWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
